citations.snippet:
Occupational Health and Safety Code 2009   Part 5 
Explanation Guide 
 
The entry permit must, at a minimum 
(a) list the name of each worker who enters the confined space and the reason for 
their entry, 
(b) provide the location of the confined space, 
(c) specify the time period for which the ent

answer: permit, compliant with th e requirements of this COP, is required for all confined space entries within the scope of this COP. The permit shall be prepared by a competent worker who is experienced in the work to be completed and is familiar with the hazards of the confined space. All U of C employees will use the U of C Confined Space Entry Permit in Appendix A.

_meta.query_text: What permits are required for confined space work and who signs them?
